summary: Completed full frontend testing of SALCHIMAX landing page. All major sections and features are working correctly. Cart functionality (add item, qty controls, clear cart, WhatsApp order) works. All 7 menu tabs visible. Mobile responsive at 375px. Footer social links correct.

ui_bugs.issue: All product prices display 'CONSULTAR' instead of actual prices. If prices are intentional as 'consult via WhatsApp', the cart shows 'CONSULTAR' in price column which may confuse users. Cart does show a note 'Los precios marcados como Consultar se confirman por WhatsApp'.

issues: SALCHIMAX text in navbar is hidden on mobile (hidden sm:block) - only logo icon visible on mobile, which is intentional and acceptable

action_items: Optional: Add data-testid='whatsapp-float' to the floating WhatsApp button for testability
Optional: Add data-testid='qty-plus' and data-testid='qty-minus' to cart qty controls
Optional: Add data-testid='whatsapp-order-btn' to ENVIAR PEDIDO button in cart
Optional: Add data-testid='why-card-N' to WhyUs feature cards
critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. App is a pure frontend landing page with no backend APIs.
Cart functionality fully working: add items, qty +/-, clear cart, WhatsApp CTA
All 7 menu tabs rendering correctly with food items and images
Social links correct: Instagram @salchi.maxx, Facebook profile URL correct
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page for SALCHIMAX Colombian restaurant. All sections working: Hero, Navbar, MarqueeStrip, Menu (7 tabs), Cart sidebar (add/remove/clear/WA order), WhyUs, Gallery, Testimonials, OrderCTA, Location (Google Maps iframe), Footer (social links). Mobile responsive. Floating WA button present. Cart badge count working. Prices show CONSULTAR (intentional - confirmed via WhatsApp).
